title: Display files attached to a workdoc in the file gallery
excerpt: I am builing a knowledgebase in Monday.  I want to attach files to Monday WorkDocs, while I can do this with attachments, the display is clunky at best.  I would like to use the file gallery to present the attachments to…

posts.author: phawley (Peter Hawley)
posts.cookedHtml: I am builing a knowledgebase in Monday. I want to attach files to Monday WorkDocs, while I can do this with attachments, the display is clunky at best. I would like to use the file gallery to present the attachments to the reader in a list view.
